untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'Parabolic System' (SAR) and directional movement crossover detection (DM14 crosses), neither of which are in the allowed indicator list. ADX direction detection requires comparing ADX slope/direction which cannot be expressed with allowed operators. Directional Movement equilibrium point calculation is not directly expressible.
translation_notes: The signal references: (1) Parabolic SAR system - not available in allowed indicators; (2) ADX direction (up/down) - requires slope/derivative calculation not supported by allowed operators; (3) Parabolic stop (DPS) - specific SAR exit mechanism not available; (4) Directional Movement crossover (+DM14 crosses -DM14) - requires DM indicators not in allowed list. To implement this signal, the backtest engine must be extended to support Parabolic SAR and Directional Movement indicators.
